case_title: AHMED ABID VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION TO HEARING BY COMMISSIONER/PRO TEM ACTING AS JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ARBITRATOR MARK RICHARD CARBONE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-11-2009 THROUGH MAR-11-2010.

PLAINTIFF AHMED ABID'S MOTION TO EXTEND THE JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED TO 10/25/2010. ORDER SIGNED. THE ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS RE-SET TO 11/18/2010 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-15-2011 IN 206, PLANITIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/17/11 IS CONTINUED TO 4/23/12 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL DEADLINES TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
